01 / 10  ·  welcome
✦   the girl herself   ✦
✦   let’s be honest
The universe took its time
making someone this unfairly beautiful.
That smile? Genuinely dangerous. Someone should have put a warning label on it.
You walked in wearing red and suddenly everything else became background noise.
The way you look right now — that’s the kind of thing people write songs about.
I’d pretend I’m not impressed, but my face has never been good at lying.

05 / 10  ·  wish

a little letter

✦   read this slowly   ✦

Dear Aleena,
I want you to know something — and I need you to actually believe it, not just skim past it.

You make me happy. I know that sounds simple, but it’s the truest thing I know how to say. Not sometimes, not when things are going well — just by existing in my life.

When you smile, I forget everything. Every problem, every noise, every thing that was bothering me five seconds ago — gone. I don’t know how you do that. All my chaos turns to peace when I’m with you. And I don’t say that lightly.

I’m not here to pressure you into anything or make today complicated. I just wanted you to have something that felt like what you actually are to me — someone worth making something beautiful for.

So. Happy birthday, Aleena. I hope you feel at least a fraction of how much you mean — to the people around you, and quietly, to me.
always — the chaos that thinks you’re the peace.
06 / 10  ·  letter
✦   okay but honestly…
Talking to you is the highlight of my day. Even when I have to be the one to start it every single time — still worth it.
I’m not going to rush you. I just want you to know there’s someone in your life who thinks the world of you, without any conditions attached.
You’ve been through something real. And I respect that. I’m not here to complicate things — I’m just here. That’s enough for me, for now.
But I’d be lying if I said you don’t make me feel something I can’t quite explain. Something quiet and certain at the same time.
So — happy birthday, Aleena. I’m really glad you exist.
✦   no pressure, no rush — the chaos that thinks you’re the peace.  tap me ♡
you are what my chaos calls peace — not that you fix me, just that somehow, around you, the noise goes quiet.
07 / 10  ·  honestly

for your 26th year

✦   things I genuinely wish for you   ✦

🌸I wish you a laugh so loud and sudden it surprises even you.
🌙I wish you one perfect evening — breeze, rain, nowhere to be, and complete peace in your chest.
✨I wish you the kind of confidence that doesn't need anyone's permission.
💛I wish you moments that remind you how rare you actually are.
🌿I wish you rest that actually feels like rest — no guilt, no worry, just stillness.
💫I wish you everything you've been quietly hoping for but haven't said out loud yet.
08 / 10  ·  wishes
🌙
goodnight, Aleena.
I hope this made you smile at least once.

I hope somewhere between the first page and this one,
you felt what I was trying to say.

You deserve all of this — and more.
Every single page of it.

Sleep well. Happy birthday.
